title: Solid Ruby Red Rectangular Plastic Table Cover (137cm x 274cm) 1 Count - Elegant & Durable Tablecloth for Parties, Events, and Home Use
features: ELEGANT RUBY RED DESIGN: Grace your party, event, or home setting with this beautiful solid ruby red rectangular plastic table cover, adding a touch of sophistication and style to any occasion just with a single vibrant piece.

PREMIUM QUALITY & DURABLE: Made from high-quality plastic material, this tablecloth ensures long-lasting use, providing excellent protection for your table surfaces while maintaining its stylish appearance.

PERFECTLY SIZED: Measuring 137cm x 274cm, our versatile rectangular table cover comfortably fits most standard rectangle tables, serving as an ideal option for a wide variety of events and gatherings.

1 COUNT PACK: Enjoy a great value with this pack containing one ruby red rectangular plastic table cover, making it an ideal choice for those looking to add an elegant touch to their occasion without breaking the bank.

EFFORTLESS CLEANUP & SETUP: Experience the convenience of a hassle-free event – our elegant and durable tablecloth is easy to deploy, wipe down, and fold away, ensuring your party, event, or home dining experience remains stress-free and enjoyable.
description: Product Description Set the mood when you set the table with this festive Red Plastic Tablecloth. Ideal for creating the perfect foundation for your party success, this plastic table cover is also a convenient way to protect your table from stains and spills. This bold red colour is ideal for a Christmas dinner, Valentine's Day party, and more. Disposable table covers also make your after party clean-up really quick and convenient. Coordinate this Plastic Red Tablecloth with our other red tableware and red party decorations, or mix and match with different solid colour party supplies to create a stylish setting for your special event. Safety Warning Do not reuse or wash. Dispose of after use. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Box Contains 1 x Tablecover See more
